title: pelargonium densiflorum
intro: Pelargonium densiflorum, also known as a type of South African geranium, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds such as linalool and geraniol, and has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, anxiety, and skin problems. The health benefits associated with Pelargonium densiflorum include reducing inflammation, alleviating stress and anxiety, and promoting a good night's sleep. The herbal preparations of this plant are often used in teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the skin.
